headline: Mastercard Stablecoin Push With Yellow Card And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) and Yellow Card have agreed a major partnership to roll out stablecoin-enabled payments across Africa, Eastern Europe, and the Middle East. The collaboration focuses on real world use cases such as cross border remittances, B2B payments, and treasury flows using blockchain based infrastructure. The partnership is aimed at linking Yellow Card’s regional network and regulatory footprint with Mastercard’s global payment rails and digital asset capabilities. For Mastercard,...

headline: Why is Ondo Finance Up 70% This Week and Will It Last?
summary: Ondo Finance has gained 70% in a week as DTCC working group selection and a JPMorgan tokenization pilot drive ONDO demand.

headline: Spain's Bizum heads to the high street to take on Visa and Mastercard
summary: Spain's homegrown payment app is making its biggest move yet, bringing account-to-account payments to the physical till and raising the stakes for US card giants.View on euronews
